resources.string: Automatically re-enables Video Boost every time Pixel Camera opens in video mode. It only reads and taps controls inside Pixel Camera, nothing else.
Video Boost will turn on by itself every time you open the Camera in video mode.
The service is ready, but automation is paused. Flip the switch to resume.
Enable the accessibility service to let the app flip the Video Boost toggle for you.
Service enabled ✓. Tap to review the steps
Tap the button below. It opens Accessibility settings with Video Boost Always-On highlighted.
Turn the service on and confirm.
If Android says \"Restricted setting\", open App info, tap the ⋮ menu (top right) → \"Allow restricted settings\", confirm with your fingerprint, and try again.
Video Boost processes video in the cloud through Google Photos. Each video is stored twice and uses data. Always-on means more of both.
Works on Pixel Pro models with Video Boost (Pixel 8 Pro and newer Pro models).
